text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Okay—— Listen up, white team! 
Great job in all the events this morning! 
Now who's ready for lunch?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all your hard work, we've got the lead over the red 
team. Everybody eat up and energize so we can keep this 
thing going in the second half! Let's win this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Muhuhu… I can't believe I got a lunchbox right from Fuji-san's 
hands… Oh, praise be, praise be～! 
If only I could add it to my collection instead of eating it…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You really should eat up. You've got quite the schedule lined up 
later, don't you? Right, here's my plate. Give me whatever 
you like. Oh, and I want at least two of those omelettes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your wish is my command! And you want the salted ones, not 
the rolled ones, right?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tachyon, Digital! 
You don't have to stop eating, but do you mind if 
we hold a little strategy meeting?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The foam combat war games are the first big event of the 
afternoon. I want us to be as prepared as we can be.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right, there's a lot of participants, so it's worth a lot of points…! 
We can't afford to lose this if we want to keep our lead.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's talk strategy, then! 
Your loyal Digitan will do her utmost…!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Keheh…! Yes, let's, Fuji-kun. 
I'm ready to bring the heat, as they say. 
Let's begin! Right now!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
First things first, we should review the rules for the war games. 
Digital, you have the floor.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes ma'am! The name "foam combat war games" is 
self-explanatory. It's a super spicy event where every 
competitor has one of these foam swords on them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We'll be switching out the usual bibs for special ones. 
When a sword hits the special bibs with enough force——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
See! They'll turn black, just like this, and when that happens, 
the person who got hit is out of the game for good.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The wincon for both sides is to take out the other team's 
captain! Oh, and the captains are going to be wearing 
event-limited alt costumes… Huehue… SO spicy!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which leads us to…? You're the one who raised this 
strategy meeting, so I wager you've got a plan in mind, 
don't you, Fuji-kun?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm. Considering the red team's roster, and 
how they were looking this morning…

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The first group to watch out for on the red team is going to 
be Pokke's squad. Late surgers and end closers who can 
turn things around in a snap. And then——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's Tap's squad. They've got real confidence in their 
stamina. If a fight starts, they're going to make it last.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, a lot of the girls on our team 
derive their strength from their ability to keep 
themselves under control.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I bet I know what Pokke's thinking. 
"We'll play defense in the first half, and then we're gonna 
turn it all around at the end"! Something like that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When it comes down to the wire, her explosive force 
is a real threat. It's a talent of hers she's very proud of.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And for good reason. That explosivity helped her make the 
ultimate dream come true, and made her strong enough to 
represent the whole country on the world stage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So we're going to exploit her pride. 
——Here's the plan.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
First, Tachyon, I want you to be our vanguard's leader. 
…Haha, come on, you don't have to give me that look!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I said "leader", but you don't actually have to do any leading. 
All you need to do is be aggressive, and push the front 
line as far forward as you can.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll choose to interpret that as a license to go wild as I please. 
Hmm… Oh, very well. Just assign me four or five squadmates 
with enough stamina to keep the fight going.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course, that was the plan. We need a vanguard that can 
actually hold the enemy's attention, after all. 
So, while Tachyon's squad has them distracted——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I want you to ambush them, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wha!? A-Ambush!? 
……Oh, no, I get it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You want me to snipe them just before they make their move, 
right!? When they stop playing defense against Tachyon-san's 
assault, and move to the front line to try and close things out——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You got it! That's when you reveal you've been hiding right 
behind them all along, and strike! Your sneak attack is going 
to be our trump card.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When Pokke-san ran her old street racing gang, 
she'd always be there on the front line, leading her squad… 
So I bet she's going to do the same today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we'll take her out and win, I take it. 
Yes, if that's the plan, your skills fit like a glove, Digital-kun.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You've raced on turf, dirt, all manner of distances, and all manner of nations… With your freakish adaptability, sneaking through a chaotic battlefield would be a simple task.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If you want me to hide without being spotted… You can count 
on me! Watching precious Umas from a distance without 
being noticed is just another day in the life of Digitan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I can disguise myself as the walls or the grass or the trees or the void or just the other day, I saw Loves-san and Marche-san being so cute together and sorry no you didn't hear that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
……So, anyway, she's an almost disturbingly perfect fit 
for the job. Right then, now that we have a plan——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Let the battle begin!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What's this!? The battle's only just started, but Agnes 
Tachyon's strike team is already on the offensive! The white 
team is pushing up the front line!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But the red team doesn't give an inch! They're sticking 
together in a phalanx and forming an unbreakable defense!! 
Are they planning to weather this assault!?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
——Good, everything's playing out just as planned. 
Now all that's left… Can I count on you, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yessir! Just leave it all to me! 
Ambush officer Agnes Digital moving out! Quietly…!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
We're nearing the end of the war games, with only three 
minutes left! With white continuing to attack, and red defending, 
the two teams have been locked in a stalemate for a while——

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
……All right. 
LET'S GET 'EM!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But the red captain Jungle Pocket's moving out!! 
Aiming to turn the tides and win this fight, she's diving 
right into the middle of the front line!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Now's my chance to strike! Time to pop the ultimate technique 
of the Digitan School of Otakudom - 『PRESENCE ERASER』… 
…Slowly… closer… closer…)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Pokke-san…!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Wha!? Digital——

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: ——So you really did come, huh. You're up, Tap!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's showtime! Leave her to me!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh!? Wha!? B-Bwaaaaaahh!?
